stemHtml: Some of the advantages of Secondary Surveillance Radar (SSR) in comparison to Primary Radar are that SSR (1) _____ and has a longer range because (2) _____.

options.a: (1) enables the controller to have a more organised display; (2) it uses longer interrogation pulses.
options.b: (1) uses smaller aerials; (2) it operates at higher frequencies.
options.c: (1) provides coded replies; (2) of its naturally higher transmission power.
options.d: (1) collects more data; (2) of the active participation of the aircraft's transponder
